consit.about: Gandarvakottai constituency is a significant rural and agricultural center in Pudukkottai district, Tamil Nadu, known for its economic importance and diverse population. The constituency includes parts of Pudukkottai city and surrounding areas, and it is part of the Pudukkottai Lok Sabha constituency. Established in 1951, it has a rich political history with diverse representation over the decades.

problem.title: Water
problem.desc: Irrigation water is unreliable: severe staff shortages and clogged canal regulators delay water reaching tail-end tanks, depriving farmers of promised supply

problem.title: Agriculture
problem.desc: Farmers face crop losses from unpredictable weather: recent unseasonal heavy rains submerged over 2,000 acres of mature paddy, and recurring droughts hurt yields

consit.about: Viralimalai constituency is a significant semi-arid and agricultural center in Pudukkottai district, Tamil Nadu, known for its economic importance and diverse population. The constituency includes parts of Pudukkottai city and surrounding areas, and it is part of the Pudukkottai Lok Sabha constituency. Established in 1951, it has a rich political history with diverse representation over the decades.

problem.title: Water
problem.desc: Villages struggle with drinking and irrigation water shortages due to low rainfall and limited canal infrastructure

consit.about: Pudukkottai constituency is a significant urban and district headquarters center in Pudukkottai district, Tamil Nadu, known for its economic importance and diverse population. The constituency includes parts of Pudukkottai city and surrounding areas, and it is part of the Pudukkottai Lok Sabha constituency. Established in 1951, it has a rich political history with diverse representation over the decades.

problem.title: Infrastructure
problem.desc: Urban roads and drainage are stressed by rapid growth

problem.title: Water
